data.title: Rick Rieder Emerges as Leading Candidate for Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: Recent data from Polymarket suggests that Rick Rieder holds a 59% probability of being appointed as the next Federal Reserve Chair, making him the leading candidate. According to NS3.AI, other contenders include Kevin Warsh with a 27% chance, Christopher Waller at 6%, and Kevin Hassett at 5%. Rieder's potential appointment is noteworthy due to his views on cryptocurrency, which could impact future Federal Reserve policies affecting the crypto market.

data.title: Revolut prepares to offer crypto services in the UAE
data.description:
UK-headquartered Revolut, a global financial application with over 60 million customers, has posted a job announcement for a “Crypto Technology Manager” for the UAE. This comes months after it received its in-principle approval for Stored Value Facilities and Retail Payment Services licenses from the Central Bank of the UAE. At the time, Revolut noted that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/revolut-to-offer-crypto-services-in-uae/

data.title: Chainlink (LINK) Stuck In A Box: What The Current Price Channel Means For Traders
data.description:
Chainlink’s native token, LINK, continues to trade within a clearly defined price channel, reflecting a period of consolidation as the broader crypto market is yet to establish a clear market direction. Meanwhile, renowned analyst Ali Martinez provides some key insights on the LINK market, highlighting the potential price targets for the next breakout. Related Reading: Litecoin Structure Intact, But $63 Remains The Line Bulls Must Defend Chainlink In Compression Phase Between $12-$15 — What Next? In a recent X post, Martinez shares an analysis of the LINK 12-hour chart, which shows the altcoin has been range-bound between key support at $11. 89 and resistance near $14
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/chainlink/chainlink-link-stuck-in-a-box-what-the-current-price-channel-means-for-traders/

data.title: U.S. CLARITY Act May Impact Stablecoin Market Dynamics
data.description: The proposed U.S. CLARITY Act includes a potential prohibition on interest payments for stablecoins. According to NS3.AI, experts caution that this could drive capital towards less regulated offshore markets. Industry analysts suggest that such a move might encourage the expansion of synthetic dollar products that operate in regulatory gray areas. This development could undermine the competitive standing of U.S.-based stablecoin markets.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of Rick Rieder being elected Federal Reserve Chairman has risen to 59%.
data.description: Polymarket data shows that Rick Rieder's probability of being elected Federal Reserve Chair has risen to 59%, making him the frontrunner. Kevin Warsh's probability is currently reported at 27%, Kevin Hassett at 5%, and Christopher Waller at 6%. Related reading: "The Last Candidate for Fed Chair: Rick Rieder's Stance on Crypto?"

data.title: Huobi HTX will list SKR (Seeker) at 21:00 today, and deposit services are now open.
data.description: Huobi HTX announced that it opened SKR deposits on January 24th at 18:00 (GMT+8). SKR/USDT spot trading will open on January 24th at 21:00 (GMT+8). SKR withdrawals will open on January 25th at 21:00 (GMT+8). Meanwhile, Solana Mobile Seeker is reportedly building a decentralized mobile ecosystem, aiming to challenge the entrenched mobile industry giants through its TEEPin network architecture and community governance. Its vision is to create a community-owned, decentralized, censorship-free platform that connects developers and users directly, and features the secure architecture of TEEPin.

data.title: BitMEX founder warns Fed dollar printing to support yen could send BTC soaring
data.description:
Arthur Hayes says Fed dollar printing to support the yen could boost Bitcoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dollar-printing-to-support-yen-may-boost-btc/

data.title: Crypto Scam Exposed After Hacker Flexed $23M in Stolen US Funds
data.description:
Key Insights: On-chain investigator ZachXBT published a detailed thread on X, exposing a threat actor identified as John, also known as “Lick”. He was displaying $23 million in cryptocurrency wallets when ZachXBT caught him.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2026/01/24/crypto-scam-exposed-after-hacker-flexed-23m-in-stolen-us-funds/

data.title: ZKsync sets real-world infrastructure and institutional adoption as 2026 focus
data.description:
ZKsync targets 2026 for real-world, enterprise-scale adoption, expanding privacy tools, appchain infrastructure, and institutional integrations across its Ethereum Layer 2 ecosystem.
source: https://catenaa.com/zksync-sets-real-world-infrastructure-and-institutional-adoption-as-2026-focus/

data.title: China's Chances in AFC U-23 Asian Cup Final Rise to 27%
data.description: China's probability of winning the AFC U-23 Asian Cup final has increased to 27%, according to a prediction model. According to NS3.AI, this marks a 12% rise in just one day, indicating growing optimism for China's performance. The final match is set to take place on January 24th at 11 PM UTC+8.

data.title: Saga Attackers Begin Moving Stolen Funds
data.description:
On January 24, it was reported that the attackers of Saga have started transferring approximately $6.2 million in stolen funds. According to BlockBeats, the stolen assets were initially distributed across five wallet addresses before being moved to Tornado Cash.

Previously, Saga suffered a $7 million loss due to an attack, leading to a suspension of its on-chain operations. The stablecoin associated with Saga also experienced a devaluation, dropping to $0.75.

data.title: Stablecoin yield bans could push capital offshore into ‘unregulated instruments’
data.description:
Proposed restrictions under the US CLARITY Act could drive demand for offshore and synthetic dollar products as investors seek yield outside regulated markets, experts warn.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/stablecoin-yield-bans-push-capital-offshore-unregulated-instruments?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Opinion predicts that China has a 27% chance of winning the U-23 Asian Cup final.
data.description: Opinion predicts China has a 27% chance of winning the "AFC U23 Asian Cup 2026 Winner" (U-23 Asian Cup final), up 12% from the previous day. The U-23 Asian Cup final is scheduled to begin at 11 PM Beijing time on January 24th.

data.title: The market capitalization of PENGUIN, a Meme cryptocurrency, has surpassed $80 million, setting a new record.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of PENGUIN, the Meme coin on the Solana chain, has surpassed $80 million, reaching a new high of $80.31 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: Saga Hack Sees Stolen Funds Funneled Through Tornado Cash
data.description: CertiK Alert has identified several deposits into Tornado Cash linked to the Saga hack, according to PANews. Before being mixed in Tornado Cash, approximately $6.2 million in stolen funds were initially distributed across five wallet addresses. These funds were then transferred through multiple transactions.

data.title: United Kingdom’s CPS orders Malaysian money launderer to return $7.6M
data.description:
The Crown Prosecution Service of the United Kingdom has asked the financier and fixer of convicted Chinese Bitcoin fraudster Zhimin Qian to return $7. 6 million or risk extra jail time. The individual in question, Sen Hok Ling, is a Malaysian international and a known ally of the incarcerated Qian. According to the United Kingdom’s CPS, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/united-kingdom-orders-money-launderer-return/

data.title: R3 plans to transform into a tokenization and on-chain capital market based on Solana.
data.description: Blockchain technology developer R3 has announced a repositioning and transformation into a Solana-based tokenization and on-chain capital market, focusing on high-yield institutional assets such as private lending and trade finance, packaged into DeFi-native structures. The aim is to bring Wall Street-level assets onto the blockchain and massively integrate off-chain capital into on-chain markets. R3 reportedly already supports over $10 billion in assets through its Corda blockchain platform and has partnered with HSBC, Bank of America, Bank of Italy, the Monetary Authority of Singapore, the Swiss National Bank, Euroclear, SDX, and SBI, among others. (CoinDesk)

data.title: R3 Develops Solana Frameworks for DeFi Integration
data.description: R3 is advancing Solana-native frameworks to incorporate private credit and trade finance into decentralized finance (DeFi) markets. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to offer stable and uncorrelated returns for DeFi investors. The development underscores the increasing institutional interest in leveraging blockchain technology for traditional financial assets.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation names expert team as quantum threats become top priority
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has elevated post-quantum cryptography to a top priority and formed a dedicated PQ team.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-foundation-quantum-top-priority/
